evidence.scientific_clarity: Scatter + OLS line + R²=0.877 annotation + highlighted OursModel point all clearly present; axes labeled with log₁₀ units; title explicit about scaling law claim.
evidence.typography: No pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype=0 set in gen_figure.py; PDF embeds fonts as Type3 (bitmap outlines) with DejaVu Sans default — text is not selectable/editable vector.
evidence.palette: Blue (#4878CF) for scatter and red (#E84040) for OursModel are colorblind-distinguishable (blue vs red OK for most CB types); no green/red directionality misuse; regression line is neutral dark grey — reasonable but red highlight on a scatter plot can still conflict with CB deuteranopia.
evidence.layout_density: tight_layout used; annotation box placed top-right without overlap; legend placed automatically without overlap; axes fill the panel well; y-range follows data naturally.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches figure content precisely; legend present; annotation box gives slope/intercept/R²; minor issue: no data.json provenance or model count confirmation in legend.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF exists but fonts are embedded as Type3 (non-selectable glyph outlines) because fonttype=42 was not set; text is not selectable in the PDF.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg, caption.tex, and gen_figure.py all exist and are non-trivial (PDF 21 KB, PNG 64 KB, SVG 54 KB).
evidence.caption_quality: Caption states the numerical OLS fit (y = -0.0449x + 0.621, R²=0.877), identifies the OursModel point with coordinates, and explains the scientific finding (strong negative scaling trend).

overall_strengths: Strong scientific narrative: scatter + fit + R² + emphasized point all directly support the Chinchilla-style scaling claim from the brief.
Caption is exemplary — includes numerical fit parameters, R², OursModel coordinates, and a plain-language interpretation of the trend.
overall_weaknesses: pdf.fonttype=42 (and svg.fonttype=0) are not set, so the PDF embeds DejaVu Sans as Type3 bitmapped outlines — text is not selectable or editable, failing the vector-fidelity requirement.
Default DejaVu Sans font is used throughout; no professional/publication-grade typeface (e.g., Helvetica, Arial, or a serif) selected, and no rcParams configuration for font choice.
